hero.title: AI That Finally Works Like a Team
hero.tagline: Digital Avatar × Smart Orchestration × Enterprise Governance
hero.description: Tego OS v3.0.0 is here — making one digital avatar truly usable by an entire team, safely and without cross-contamination. Isolated instances, data isolation, template governance, and operational observability are rewritten end-to-end, upgrading a "working product" into a "system that can truly be delivered to enterprises, organizations, and production businesses."

bullets.dualAvatar: Dual Avatar System: Personal avatars in isolated containers, organizational avatars with multi-replica HA — each a full AI runtime
bullets.orchestration: Orchestration as Productivity: LAMP framework + DAG concurrent scheduling, 2-5x efficiency boost
bullets.governance: Enterprise Governance: Multi-tenant 4-layer isolation, RBAC, audit logs, full lifecycle management — fully traceable
bullets.mcp: Hot-Pluggable Skills + Zero-Invasion MCP: Install skills like apps, one-click legacy API conversion

hero.imgAlt: TeGo-OS Enterprise Digital Avatar & AI Super Team Platform

a2ui.description: AI no longer just outputs text, but generates interactive interfaces directly. Charts, forms, buttons - what you see is what you get.

skills.title: Agent Skills Extension
skills.description: Extend AI capabilities like installing apps. Standardized skill format, cross-platform compatible, unlimited extensibility.

whyTego.title: Why Choose TeGo
whyTego.subtitle: From agent silos to AI Super Team, enabling agents to collaborate like real teams

collaboration.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration
collaboration.description: Break down AI tool barriers, enabling multiple agents to think autonomously, share information, and make decisions together like a real team.

efficiency.title: Concurrent Execution
efficiency.description: Based on DAG scheduling engine, automatically analyze task dependencies, execute parallel tasks simultaneously, 2-5x efficiency improvement.

intelligence.title: Getting Smarter
intelligence.description: Experience pool continuous learning, successful cases automatically accumulated and reused, new task planning time reduced by 40-60%.

security.title: Secure & Controllable

footer.text: Serving multiple enterprise clients across finance, manufacturing, retail and more

enterprise.title: Enterprise Internal Collaboration
enterprise.description: Through intelligent planning engine, complex office tasks (travel management, project kickoff, meeting scheduling, administrative approvals, knowledge Q&A) are autonomously decomposed into executable subtasks, orchestrating different business agents (admin agent, calendar agent, HR agent) for concurrent execution, achieving end-to-end business closed loop.

government.title: Government Service System Collaboration
government.description: Meeting government requirements for local deployment, data sovereignty, and full-chain control through highly secure and compliant architecture, unifying scattered government service processes across different departments and systems.

finance.title: Financial Industry System Collaboration
finance.description: Financial applications focus on intelligent investment research assistance, full-process credit risk control, and compliance & AML in three core scenarios, aggregating and processing massive unstructured data to precisely capture market and customer risks.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing System Collaboration
manufacturing.description: The collaboration platform connects demand side (sales orders), planning & scheduling (APS, MRP), and execution side (procurement, production), enabling cross-system information alignment and dynamic adjustment through planning, supplier, and predictive maintenance agent clusters.

stateOwned.title: State-Owned Enterprise Collaboration
stateOwned.description: The platform architecture design fits state-owned enterprise needs perfectly, abstracting AI capabilities into unified services, avoiding redundant investments across business lines, and solving core demands of 'breaking system silos' and 'avoiding duplicate investments'.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Shenzhen Zhama Future Technology Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "we") is committed to protecting your personal privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information.
introduction.content2: By using our services, you agree to the terms of this privacy policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

collection.title: Information Collection
collection.content: We may collect the following types of information:

items.title: Personal Identity Information:
items.content: name, email address, phone number, etc.

items.title: Technical Information:
items.content: IP address, browser type, device information, access time, etc.

items.title: Usage Data:
items.content: how you use our services, including pages and features accessed

collection.usageIntro: We use the collected information for:
usageItems: Analyzing usage patterns to improve user experience

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information in the following circumstances:

items.title: Service Providers:
items.content: with trusted third parties who help us operate our business

items.title: Legal Requirements:
items.content: when required by law or to protect our rights

items.title: Business Transfers:
items.content: in the event of a merger, acquisition, or asset sale

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, modification, or destruction. However, please note that no system is 100% secure.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: We will only retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected.
retention.content2: When your information is no longer needed, we will securely delete or anonymize it.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: Under applicable data protection laws, you may have the following rights:
items: Access information we hold about you
Request deletion of your personal information
Object to processing of your information

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: Our services are not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and know that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and significant changes will be notified to you via email or service notifications.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy policy, please contact us through:
items: Address: Shenzhen Science and Technology Park, Nanshan District
contact.response: We will endeavor to respond to your inquiry within 30 days.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: Welcome to TeGo platform. By accessing and using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
acceptance.content2: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the service will be deemed acceptance of the modified terms.

service.title: Service Description
service.content: TeGo is an enterprise-grade multi-agent autonomous collaboration platform that provides the following services:
service.modification: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate any services at any time without prior notice.

account.title: User Accounts
account.content: To use certain services, you need to create an account. You agree to:
promises: Provide accurate and complete registration information
Maintain the accuracy of account information
Protect the security of your account password
Take responsibility for all activities under your account
restrictionItems: Violate any applicable laws or regulations

conduct.title: User Conduct Guidelines
conduct.content: When using our services, you may not engage in the following activities:
prohibited: Infringe on others' intellectual property rights
Interfere with or disrupt the normal operation of services
Attempt unauthorized access to systems or data

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content in the service, including but not limited to text, graphics, interfaces, and code, is protected by intellectual property laws.
ip.userContent: You retain ownership of uploaded content but grant us a license to use, modify, and display such content.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Our services are provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties. We do not guarantee that the services will:
reasons: Be fully compatible with third-party services
Be completely secure or free from unauthorized access

changes.title: Terms Changes
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be notified to you via email or service notifications. Continued use of the service indicates acceptance of the modified terms.

disputes.title: Dispute Resolution
disputes.content: Any disputes arising from the use of this service should be resolved through friendly consultation. If consultation fails, they should be submitted to a court with jurisdiction.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us through the following methods:
methods: Address: Shenzhen Science and Technology Park, Nanshan District

aboutSection.title: From Agent Silos to AI Super Team
aboutSection.subtitle: Enable AI agents to autonomously collaborate like high-performing teams and automatically complete complex business tasks
aboutSection.description: We are not just integrating AI tools, but enabling multiple agents to think autonomously, collaborate intelligently, and execute concurrently like a real team. Break down barriers between AI tools with unified management, intelligent collaboration, and continuous evolution to truly achieve enterprise AI at scale

vision.title: TeGo vs Traditional AI Platforms - Differentiation
paragraphs: From Silos to Team: Solve agent silo problems, enable true AI collaboration instead of working in isolation
From Serial to Concurrent: DAG concurrent scheduling engine, parallel task execution, 2-5x efficiency improvement
From Tools to Intelligence: Based on LAMP collaboration framework, agents autonomously reason and decide like human teams

features.title: LAMP Intelligent Collaboration Framework
features.description: Think-Speak-Decide three-stage reasoning pipeline, enabling agents to continuously reason, share information, and make collaborative decisions like human teams, improving task success rate by 15-25%

features.title: DAG Concurrent Scheduling Engine
features.description: Automatically analyze task dependencies, execute parallel tasks simultaneously, transform from serial to concurrent, achieve 2-5x efficiency improvement, response speed as low as <100ms

features.title: Experience Pool Continuous Learning
features.description: Vector storage of successful experiences, intelligent retrieval of historical cases, automatic reuse of best strategies for new tasks, reducing planning time by 40-60%, getting smarter over time

features.title: A2A Open Protocol
features.description: Support Agent2Agent standard protocol for seamless integration with third-party agents, expand team capability boundaries, build open enterprise AI ecosystem

footer.suffix: , build an untiring AI team to automatically complete complex business tasks.

typingPhrases: Build an Untiring AI Super Team
Think Autonomously · Collaborate Intelligently · Execute Concurrently
From Agent Silos to Super Teams

featuresSection.title: Four Core Capabilities
featuresSection.subtitle: From task understanding to autonomous execution, building a true AI Super Team

collection.title: Intelligent Task Decomposition · Understand Intent & Auto Plan
collection.description: Understand high-level business objectives, automatically decompose into executable subtasks, intelligently match suitable agent team members. Support intent understanding, task decomposition, dependency analysis, and execution plan generation, transforming complex tasks into clear execution steps.

analysis.title: Concurrent Intelligent Scheduling · 2-5x Efficiency Boost
analysis.description: DAG (Directed Acyclic Graph) task scheduling engine automatically analyzes task dependencies, launches independent tasks in parallel, dynamically adjusts concurrency, and isolates exceptions for stability. Transform from serial execution to concurrent scheduling, dramatically reducing task completion time.

organization.title: Team Collaboration Framework · LAMP Intelligence
organization.description: Based on cutting-edge academic research LAMP framework, implements Think (continuous reasoning analysis), Speak (agent communication sharing), Decide (collaborative decision fusion). Enable AI agents to share information, reason collaboratively, and make decisions together like human teams.

gateway.title: Continuous Learning Evolution · Getting Smarter Over Time
gateway.description: Vector storage of historical successful experiences, intelligent retrieval of similar cases, automatic reuse of best strategies. Failed cases serve as counter-examples to avoid repeating mistakes. New task planning time reduced by 40-60%. Experience accumulation enables AI team continuous evolution, achieving 95%+ task success rate.

taskManagement.title: Full-Process Visual Tracking
taskManagement.description: DAG view displays task dependencies, timeline view tracks execution progress, reasoning view presents agent analysis process, communication view monitors team collaboration messages. Fully observable, traceable, and auditable.

habitTracking.title: Dynamic Replanning Capability
habitTracking.description: Automatically identify 7 types of execution anomalies, analyze 4 trend directions to predict task trajectory. Auto-trigger plan adjustment when severe anomalies detected, ensuring task completion with 95%+ success rate.

financeManagement.title: Enterprise-Grade Secure Deployment
financeManagement.description: Support private deployment, hybrid cloud deployment, and SaaS service modes. Complete permission system and audit mechanisms meet enterprise data security and compliance requirements, ensuring business data safety.

tegoOS.title: TeGo AI Super Team
tegoOS.subtitle: Build an Untiring AI Super Team to Autonomously Complete Complex Business Tasks

problem.title: Four Major Challenges in Enterprise AI Applications
problem.description: Agent silos, fragmented capabilities, lack of governance, efficiency bottlenecks—data isolated between different AI tools unable to collaborate, broken processes requiring manual assembly, lacking unified permissions and audits, serial execution with low efficiency. Enterprises urgently need a solution that enables true AI collaboration.

mission.title: TeGo's Solution
mission.description: Build AI Super Team: Enable multiple agents to think autonomously, collaborate intelligently, and execute concurrently like a real team. Based on LAMP collaboration framework and DAG concurrent scheduling engine, break down AI tool barriers, achieve unified management, intelligent collaboration, and continuous evolution. From agent silos to super teams.

topology.title: Topological Sorting
topology.description: Automatically analyze task dependencies, build execution topology, determine optimal execution order

parallel.title: Parallel Execution
parallel.description: Launch independent tasks simultaneously, transform serial to concurrent, dramatically reduce completion time

dynamic.title: Dynamic Adjustment
dynamic.description: Runtime dynamic concurrency adjustment, intelligent optimization based on resource status and task characteristics

isolation.title: Exception Isolation
isolation.description: Single task exceptions don't affect other tasks, ensuring overall process stability

experience.title: Experience Pool Continuous Learning
experience.subtitle: Vector storage of historical successful experiences, intelligent retrieval and reuse of best strategies, getting smarter over time

vector.title: Vector Storage
vector.description: Convert successful execution trajectories into vector representations, efficiently stored in experience pool

retrieval.title: Intelligent Retrieval
retrieval.description: New tasks automatically retrieve similar historical experiences, quickly match best strategies

reuse.title: Strategy Reuse
reuse.description: Reuse historical successful strategies, reducing planning time by 40-60%

evolution.title: Continuous Evolution
evolution.description: Failed cases serve as counter-examples to avoid mistakes, system continuously optimizes

a2ui.title: A2UI Dynamic Interface Engine
a2ui.description: Dynamic interface rendering engine based on Google A2UI protocol. AI no longer just outputs text, but directly generates interactive interface components - charts, forms, buttons, what you see is what you get. We led Google's official release by implementing the first complete React renderer.
features: Full implementation of A2UI protocol specification
15+ standard components (Text, Card, Chart, Form, etc.)
Independent style system, zero Tailwind dependency
Declarative data format, no code injection risk
Support for streaming rendering and real-time updates

skills.title: Agent Skills Ecosystem
skills.description: Extend AI capabilities like installing apps. Standardized skill definition specification, compatible with Claude Agent Skills open standard, cross-platform usable. Supports Cowork collaboration mode for dynamic multi-skill combination without predefined workflows.
features: Cowork collaboration mode, intelligent multi-skill orchestration

hero.title: One Digital Avatar — Now Truly Usable by an Entire Team
hero.tagline: Isolated Instances × Data Isolation × Template Governance × Operational Observability
hero.description: v3.0.0 rewrites the underlying instance orchestration, data isolation, template governance, and operational observability, while completing the out-of-box client experience. This is not a routine feature iteration — it upgrades a "working product" into a "system that can truly be delivered to enterprises, organizations, and production businesses."

bullets.perUser: per_user Isolated Instances: One avatar spins up an independent container per user — sessions, memory, and files never cross-contaminate
bullets.isolation: S3 Three-Layer Data Isolation: Templates and runtime split by prefix; each user can be backed up / restored / destroyed independently
bullets.governance: Template Single Source of Truth: Templates are admin-only; ordinary users writing template paths are forced to 403
bullets.monitor: BusinessMonitor Dashboard: One screen for coverage, growth, engagement, workflow, and skill effectiveness

hero.secondaryCtaHint: Full operational guide with 53 UI screenshots
hero.tertiaryCtaHint: Pure Private / Hybrid Cloud / SaaS — three delivery modes

watershed.title: Why v3.0.0: Four Watershed Moments
watershed.subtitle: From a "working product" to a "system that can truly be delivered to enterprises"

concurrency.before: Multi-user shared runtime — sessions and memory easily cross-contaminate
concurrency.after: per_user isolated instances — each user gets a dedicated runtime

isolation.before: S3 "shared pot" — impossible to slice recovery / destruction by user
isolation.after: Templates and runtime split by prefix — independent backup / restore / destroy per user

governance.before: Anyone can edit — conflicts after edits
governance.after: Template is single source of truth — ordinary users writing template paths are forced 403

observability.before: Metrics scattered across multiple analytics warehouses
observability.after: BusinessMonitor dashboard shows coverage, growth, engagement, workflow, skill effectiveness on one screen

capabilityCards.title: Eight Core Capabilities — Each Card Plays
capabilityCards.subtitle: Anchored on "deliverable to enterprise", this release covers five dimensions: architecture, governance, observability, experience, ecosystem

perUser.name: Isolated Instances (per_user)
perUser.upgrade: One avatar spins up dedicated containers per user, idle auto-recycle, end-to-end quota guardrails
perUser.value: Multiple users can use one avatar concurrently — sessions, memory, files never collide

s3.name: S3 Runtime Data Isolation
s3.upgrade: Templates and runtime split by prefix; shared and per_user backed up independently
s3.value: No more cross-user data — DR can recover per user

template.name: Template / Runtime Single Authority
template.upgrade: Templates only editable in console; ordinary users writing template paths are forced 403
template.value: Configurations no longer accidentally overwritten — clear governance boundary

monitor.name: Business Operations Dashboard
monitor.upgrade: Brand-new BusinessMonitor service — unified coverage, growth, engagement, workflow, skill effectiveness
monitor.value: Management sees platform health and business performance on one screen

miniChat.name: Desktop Mini Chat Floating Window
miniChat.upgrade: Always-on-top mini chat window sharing one session with the main window
miniChat.value: Summon the avatar mid-workflow without breaking the main task

skills.name: 16 Tego Template Skills
skills.upgrade: 11 IT Ops + 5+ Cross-Border E-commerce, with executable scripts
skills.value: New avatars instantly productive — no need to build a skill library from scratch

build.name: Build Pipeline Rewrite
build.upgrade: tego-claw image build split into compile/package stages, base image slimmed down
build.value: Faster CI builds, smaller images, more stable runtime

test.name: Test Suite Massively Expanded
test.upgrade: New contract, gateway, file upload, notification push integration tests
test.value: More reliable regression on critical paths — refactor with confidence

perUserIsolation.title: Isolated Instances (per_user)
perUserIsolation.subtitle: One avatar, many people, no interference
perUserIsolation.painPoint: In the v2 era, one avatar mapped to one container, with all users sharing the same runtime state. For scenarios like customer support and IT tickets where dozens of users hit the same avatar, sessions, memory, and workspaces overwrote each other — making true frontline production deployment difficult.

diagram.recycle: Idle 5min → graceful recycle / state flush to S3

container.title: Per-user dedicated container
container.description: First connection spins up a dedicated instance bound to a dedicated S3 namespace

recycle.title: Idle auto-recycle
recycle.description: Default 5 minutes idle triggers graceful shutdown — container has 45 seconds to flush state to S3, sub-second wake on next use

quota.title: Three-dimensional quota guardrails
quota.description: Per-avatar, per-user, per-tenant — independent caps prevent any over-allocation

capacity.title: Resource capacity guardrails
capacity.description: Host CPU / memory > 80% returns 503 + queues — prevents node overload

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat timeout fallback
heartbeat.description: 3 minutes no heartbeat triggers auto-shutdown — eliminates "zombie containers + permanently consumed quota"

stale.title: Stale lock auto-cleanup
stale.description: PROVISIONING / PENDING stuck from process crash is swept by a timer to FAILED — auto-retry next round

perUserIsolation.roadmap: Warm Pool design is on the next-stage roadmap, targeting first-start latency from "5–15s cold-start" down to "<1s".

s3Isolation.title: S3 Three-Layer Data Isolation
s3Isolation.subtitle: Templates belong to templates, runtime belongs to users
s3Isolation.description: For per_user to actually work, the underlying backup/restore paths can no longer be a "shared pot". v3.0.0 redesigned the S3 namespace.

template.comment: Avatar-level template (admin writable, all users read-only)

perUser.comment: Per-user dedicated backup under per_user mode

jwt.title: JWT carries instanceUserId
jwt.description: End-to-end transparent propagation — identifies which user instance each request belongs to

rewrite.title: Gateway auto-rewrites read/write paths
rewrite.description: S3 paths rewritten by instanceUserId — business code is unaware

fallback.title: Three-layer fallback read
fallback.description: runtime/<key> → template/<key> → legacy seed path — smooth transition for new and old users

reset.title: One-click reset of all user instances
reset.description: Stop containers, delete orchestration resources, clear volumes, clear deployment records — clean and complete

s3Isolation.value: What this means for customers: when one avatar is used by many users, each person's sessions, memory, workspace, and media files are truly "mine" — independently backed up, restored, and destroyed.

adminOnly.title: Templates editable only by admin / owner via console
adminOnly.description: Writes auto-bump the corresponding version (configVersion / workspaceVersion / skillsVersion)

interception.title: Gateway-side write interception
interception.description: Ordinary user tokens trying to write template paths get an immediate 403

consistency.title: Dual-write consistency
consistency.description: RPC updates the local replica first, then admin REST writes the S3 template — operator sees no delay, other replicas converge via heartbeat

backfill.title: Backfill script
backfill.description: pnpm db:backfill-template idempotently migrates legacy avatar seed data to the new template path

businessMonitor.title: Business Operations Dashboard
businessMonitor.subtitle: One screen for management to see platform health and business performance
businessMonitor.description: The new BusinessMonitorService aggregates metrics that were scattered across audit and analytics warehouses into a directly-displayable BusinessMonitorSnapshot v1 contract.

coverage.name: Coverage
coverage.metrics: Real active-user denominator — no more estimation

growth.name: Growth / Engagement
growth.metrics: DAU / WAU / MAU, retention and activity trends

tasks.name: Tasks / Realtime
tasks.metrics: Current task volume and real-time load

workflow.name: Workflow
workflow.metrics: Handoff, FCR (first-contact resolution), auto-flow rate, closure rate

tech.lru: In-process LRU (5s TTL) cache — high-frequency multi-panel polling won't hammer the database
tech.dual: Both ai-studio and dashboard ship a dedicated route _authenticated/admin_.business-monitor

skillLibrary.title: 16 Out-of-the-Box Tego Template Skills
skillLibrary.subtitle: For digital avatars to "work immediately", the biggest barrier has never been the model — it's the lack of a ready skill library.
skillLibrary.noticeText: Each skill ships with an executable script (bash) — not a "prompt template", but actually runnable.

ticket-handler.name: ticket-handler
ticket-handler.ability: Full ticket lifecycle: intake, classification, priority, routing, SLA tracking

incident-triage.name: incident-triage
incident-triage.ability: Rapid incident diagnosis: log analysis, metric correlation, runbook matching

auto-remediation.name: auto-remediation
auto-remediation.ability: Auto-remediation: service restart, disk cleanup, cache flush (with dry-run)

system-monitor.name: system-monitor
system-monitor.ability: Proactive health monitoring: connectivity, resources, tiered anomaly alerts

infra-documenter.name: infra-documenter
infra-documenter.ability: Auto infrastructure docs: discovery, inventory, topology, change tracking

patch-manager.name: patch-manager
patch-manager.ability: Vulnerability scanning and patch lifecycle: CVE matching, risk assessment, rollback plan

sla-reporter.name: sla-reporter
sla-reporter.ability: SLA compliance reports: availability, MTTR, trend analysis

market-scout.name: market-scout
market-scout.ability: Market research: cross-validate Amazon Best Sellers / Google Trends / TikTok

competitor-intel.name: competitor-intel
competitor-intel.ability: Competitor analysis: scrape/analyze reviews, identify weaknesses, generate attack strategies

listing-forge.name: listing-forge
listing-forge.ability: Listing copywriting: auto-pull competitor weaknesses from memory, SEO optimized

image-studio.name: image-studio
image-studio.ability: Hero / scene images: white background, compliance, AI generation

video-maker.name: video-maker
video-maker.ability: 15-second UGC short videos for TikTok / Reels

voice-miner.name: voice-miner
voice-miner.ability: Mining real user pain points from Reddit / forums

review-shield.name: review-shield
review-shield.ability: Negative review classification and compliant responses

locale-adapt.name: locale-adapt
locale-adapt.ability: Multi-market localization: cultural adaptation, local keywords, market SEO

desktopExperience.title: Desktop Experience Triple Hit
desktopExperience.subtitle: Mini Chat floating window / Downloads center / Windows installer rewrite

features.1: Independent Tauri window — compact, frameless, always-on-top
features.2: Reuses the same connection: shares one session with the main window — no split conversations
features.3: Global hotkey: Spotlight / Raycast-style summon and dismiss
features.4: Cross-window sync: both windows always show the same session
features.5: Lazy create + reuse: webview only created on first summon to avoid double-loading

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.description: Single entry for desktop, mobile, and CLI installers — enterprise users can quickly distribute to different endpoints after first onboarding

features.1: 584-line NSIS installer rewrite — more stable install / upgrade / uninstall
features.2: New offline packaging script create-windows-installer.sh — friendly to private-deployment customers

scenarios.title: Real-World Scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: With 16 out-of-the-box template skills, new scenarios are just "install skills + chain the flow"

itSupport.title: Scenario A · IT Internal Support
itSupport.input: An employee asks in chat: "My laptop can't connect to VPN"
itSupport.path: Avatar identifies → incident-triage pulls logs → auto-remediation outputs a fix script (dry-run) → if it fails, ticket-handler auto-creates a ticket and tracks SLA
itSupport.result: Common issues self-resolve, complex issues escalate as structured tickets

crossBorder.title: Scenario B · Cross-Border Selection / Listing
crossBorder.input: Operator wants to quickly scope a new category
crossBorder.path: market-scout pulls best sellers across platforms → competitor-intel scrapes reviews and identifies weaknesses → listing-forge writes SEO-optimized listings → image-studio / video-maker produce visuals → locale-adapt localizes for multiple markets
crossBorder.result: What used to take 1 week from selection to listing is now drilled down to a 1-day rehearsal

regulated.title: Scenario C · Government / Finance High-Sensitivity
regulated.input: Regulator requires that each user's conversations and files be mutually invisible and independently destroyable
regulated.path: Avatar set to per_user → per-user dedicated containers + dedicated S3 namespaces → revoking an account triggers one-click cleanup of the corresponding prefix
regulated.result: Meets compliance requirements for "separable audit / targeted destruction of data"

performanceMetrics.title: Performance & Footprint
performanceMetrics.subtitle: v3.0.0 also tightens build, image, and runtime footprint

build.improvement: Two-stage split — JS compilation runs once on a single x64 machine

baseImage.improvement: Removed Bun (~96MB), Go / Rust / build-essential (~750MB), and global CLIs

ci.improvement: Using npm official source — faster than Chinese mirrors on GitHub runners

monitor.improvement: In-process LRU cache 5s TTL — multi-panel high-frequency polling doesn't hit DB

memory.improvement: Default 768m (was 1024m) — a 16GB host can hold ~30% more instances

chat.improvement: Virtualized log lists — long sessions and long logs render smoothly

architecture.title: v3.0.0 Architecture Overview
architecture.subtitle: Server + Gateway + S3 + Dashboard — four components with clear boundaries at last

legend.server: Server: hub for permission, quota, audit, monitoring, template/runtime governance
legend.gateway: Gateway: instance creation, scheduling, heartbeat, shutdown — shared and per_user share one scheduler
legend.s3: S3: three-layer prefix isolation by template / shared / per-user/{userId}
legend.monitor: Dashboard: aggregation layer deployed independently, cached independently, doesn't impact transactional path

steps.1: Run database migration to 0015: pnpm db:migrate
steps.2: For legacy avatars, run pnpm db:backfill-template once to explicitly relocate template paths
steps.3: For per_user mode, validate idle recycle / heartbeat fallback / capacity guardrails on a test tenant before canary in production
steps.4: Windows users should switch to the new NSIS installer
steps.5: Private-deployment customers align build process with "build / bundle done externally → only packaged into image"

breaking.1: Removed legacy avatar_agents table and corresponding API routes — external direct-callers must switch to the new template API
breaking.2: JWT payload adds instanceUserId — clients should re-issue tokens after upgrade
breaking.3: S3 path layout has changed — fallback exists for legacy paths, but explicit relocation is recommended
breaking.4: Gateway template write permission tightened — ordinary user tokens writing template paths return 403
breaking.5: tego-claw Docker image no longer compiles JS internally — private-deployment build flows must adapt
breaking.6: Base image removed Bun / Go / Rust — private plugins relying on in-container compilation must add them back in their own Dockerfile

privateDelivery.title: Private Deployment Capabilities
privateDelivery.subtitle: Pure private / Hybrid cloud / SaaS — three delivery modes covering government, enterprise, finance, and cross-border

deployment.ability: Pure private (K8s / Docker) · Hybrid cloud · SaaS

residency.ability: All data can stay in the customer's intranet; S3 can be replaced with compatible object storage

auth.ability: Built-in account/password + LDAP, supports enterprise SSO (OIDC / SAML)

audit.ability: Operation audit, call audit, data export

localization.ability: Adapted to mainstream domestic CPU / OS / database / object storage

offline.ability: Full offline installer supported, including model weights packaging

isolation.after: ✓ Three-layer path split — independent backup / destroy

speed.label: to your first business scenario in production

painPoints.title: Why most enterprise AI pilots never make it to production
painPoints.subtitle: It is rarely the model. It is the enterprise-grade capabilities that are missing.

shared.title: Everyone shares one conversation
shared.description: When dozens of employees use the same AI assistant, sessions overwrite each other and memory becomes unreliable — not built for real workloads.

data.title: Data leaves, and never really comes back
data.description: Without clear visibility into where data goes and where answers come from, compliance and audit anxiety keep AI stuck in PoC.

control.title: Permissions are blurry, configuration is out of control
control.description: Anyone can change AI behavior, configurations get overwritten, and operations teams cannot govern AI at enterprise scale.

blackbox.title: Outcomes are unclear, value is hard to prove
blackbox.description: Once AI is live, there is no unified operations view to answer how many employees were covered, how many issues were resolved, how much labor was saved.

valuePillars.title: Four foundations every enterprise AI platform should have
valuePillars.subtitle: Tego OS delivers more than an AI assistant — it gives every role a dedicated digital workforce.

dedicated.title: A dedicated AI coworker per employee
dedicated.description: Each employee gets an isolated AI workspace with independent sessions, memory and files — built for true enterprise concurrency.

ownership.title: Data stays with the enterprise
ownership.description: Conversations, knowledge and files all live in your own space, with independent backup, migration and destruction to satisfy compliance.

governance.title: Governable and auditable end-to-end
governance.description: Permissions, audit, operations dashboards, SLA and version control are unified — every AI action is visible, controllable and accountable.

ready.title: Out-of-the-box industry capabilities
ready.description: 16 production-grade skills for IT operations and cross-border e-commerce ship with the platform — new digital workers go live without building a skill library from scratch.

scenarios.title: Already creating value across these business scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Covering internal support, growth-driving operations, and high-compliance workflows.

itSupport.title: 24×7 frontline response for employee tech requests
itSupport.description: From the moment an employee asks for help to auto-diagnosis, automated remediation and SLA tracking — common issues close in minutes, complex ones escalate as structured tickets.

crossBorder.title: A digital growth team for selection, listing and localization
crossBorder.description: Market research, competitor analysis, listing copywriting, creative assets and multi-market localization run as one digital workforce pipeline — giving small teams enterprise-grade operating power.

regulated.title: Digital workers built for the most regulated industries
regulated.description: Each user's data is fully isolated and can be deterministically destroyed when an account is revoked — meeting the strictest compliance and audit requirements.

outcomes.title: Outcomes our customers achieve
outcomes.subtitle: What a Tego OS digital workforce typically delivers in production.

resolution.label: First-contact resolution

ttm.label: Time to market

cost.label: Operations headcount saved
cost.description: Repetitive, rules-based work is handed off to digital coworkers

compliance.title: Compliance & audit

domestic.title: Domestic stack support

isolation.title: Per-user data isolation
isolation.description: Each employee's conversations, memory and files stay invisible to others — independently backed up, restored and destroyed.

sla.title: Stability & SLA
sla.description: Production-grade capacity guardrails, fault-tolerance and observability backed by enterprise SLA commitments.

delivery.title: Flexible delivery and commercial models
delivery.subtitle: Whether you need to keep all data on-premise or want to spin up by usage, there is a fit.
